code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import api from'../../services/api';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CreateProduct=()=>{const[formData,setFormData]=useState({name:'',price:'',categoryId:''});const navigate=useNavigate();const handleChange=e=>{setFormData({...formData,[e.target.name]:e.target.value});};const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{await api.post('/products',formData);navigate('/admin/products');}catch(error){console.error('Error creating product:',error);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"text-2xl font-bold mb-4",children:"Create Product"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,className:"bg-white p-6 rounded shadow-md",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"block text-gray-700",children:"Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",name:"name",value:formData.name,onChange:handleChange,className:"w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded",required:true})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"block text-gray-700",children:"Price"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",name:"price",value:formData.price,onChange:handleChange,className:"w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded",required:true})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"block text-gray-700",children:"Category ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",name:"categoryId",value:formData.categoryId,onChange:handleChange,className:"w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded",required:true})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"bg-blue-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded",children:"Create"})]})]});};export default CreateProduct;
